creator: lisong@stanford.edu
text:
The following page for downloading the man pages:

 www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi/help.html

 seems not working. When I clicked on one of the '[download]' links, I
 can only get a tgz file of size 20 bytes.

Fix: 

Maybe the cgi script or the filesystem problem?
How-To-Repeat: Use any popular browser and download from the page.
